ocr.text: In the competitive landscape of the Asia-Pacific coatings and adhesives market, LyondellBasell has strategically positioned its
product offerings to cater to diverse industry needs, as illustrated in the accompanying sales mix data table. The focus on
various product types such as IndustrialAdhesives and PackagingAdhesives highlights the company's commitment to
addressing both industrial and consumer applications. For instance, PackagingAdhesives recorded a sales target of 62,000 units
for Q2 2025, reflecting the robust demand in sectors like packaging and labeling. Additionally, the market share of
ConstructionCoatings stands at 12%, underscoring the significant role this segment plays in the overall portfolio. The
projections for Q4 2025 indicate total sales reaching 56,000 units, a testament to the expected growth in market dynamics.
Furthermore, the data shows that SpecialtyCoatings remain a critical area for innovation and expansion, warranting continued
investment to enhance market presence.
CoatingandAdhesiveSales  UnitsSold  SalesVolume  Revenue(HKD)
ProductType  Q12025  Q22025  Q32025  Q42025  TotalUnits  MarketShare  GrowthRate(%)
ConstructionCoatings  5000  5200  5500  5700  25900  [HIDDEN]  3.0%
CustomerSatisfaction  85%  87%  89%  90%  87.75%  N/A  Total
By analyzing metrics such as TotalUnits and GrowthRate(%), stakeholders can gain valuable insights into the performance
trajectory of each product category. This strategic approach not only anticipates market demands but also positions
LyondellBasell to capitalize on emerging opportunities within the Asia-Pacific region. As the company navigates these evolving
market conditions, the emphasis on quality and performance in its coating and adhesive offerings remains paramount to
sustaining competitive advantage.
